docs.title: pylightningfx
docs.text: Python client for bitFlyer Lightning API.

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: pip install pylightningfx

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
from pylightningfx import Client

# Public API (no authentication required)
client = Client()
ticker = client.get_ticker("BTC_JPY")
print(ticker["ltp"])  # Last traded price

# Private API
client = Client(api_key="YOUR_API_KEY", api_secret="YOUR_API_SECRET")
balance = client.get_balance()
print(balance)

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Full coverage of HTTP Public API
  • Full coverage of HTTP Private API
  • Zero external dependencies (stdlib only)
  • HMAC-SHA256 authentication built-in

docs.title: Private API
docs.text:
These endpoints require authentication via API key and secret.

from pylightningfx import Client

client = Client(api_key="YOUR_API_KEY", api_secret="YOUR_API_SECRET")

docs.title: get_permissions
docs.text:
client.get_permissions() -> list[str]

Returns a list of endpoints accessible with the current API key.

docs.title: get_balance
docs.text:
client.get_balance() -> list[dict]

Returns the account balance for each currency.

docs.title: get_collateral / get_collateral_accounts
docs.text:
client.get_collateral() -> dict
client.get_collateral_accounts() -> list[dict]

Returns collateral status and per-currency collateral amounts.

docs.title: get_addresses
docs.text:
client.get_addresses() -> list[dict]

Returns deposit addresses for each cryptocurrency.

docs.title: get_coin_ins / get_coin_outs
docs.text:
client.get_coin_ins(count, before, after) -> list[dict]
client.get_coin_outs(count, before, after) -> list[dict]

Returns cryptocurrency deposit and withdrawal history.

docs.title: get_bank_accounts
docs.text:
client.get_bank_accounts() -> list[dict]

Returns a list of registered bank accounts.

docs.title: get_deposits / get_withdrawals
docs.text:
client.get_deposits(count, before, after) -> list[dict]
client.get_withdrawals(count, before, after, message_id) -> list[dict]

Returns fiat deposit and withdrawal history.

docs.title: withdraw
docs.text:
client.withdraw(
    currency_code: str,
    bank_account_id: int,
    amount: int,
    code: str | None = None,
) -> dict

Submits a withdrawal request. Pass code if two-factor authentication is required.

docs.title: send_child_order
docs.text:
client.send_child_order(
    product_code: str,
    child_order_type: str,   # "LIMIT" or "MARKET"
    side: str,               # "BUY" or "SELL"
    size: float,
    price: float | None = None,
    minute_to_expire: int = 43200,
    time_in_force: str = "GTC",
) -> dict

Places a new order.

docs.title: cancel_child_order
docs.text:
client.cancel_child_order(
    product_code: str,
    child_order_id: str | None = None,
    child_order_acceptance_id: str | None = None,
) -> None

Cancels an existing order. Provide either child_order_id or child_order_acceptance_id.

docs.title: send_parent_order
docs.text:
client.send_parent_order(
    parameters: list[dict],
    order_method: str = "SIMPLE",  # SIMPLE / IFD / OCO / IFDOCO
    minute_to_expire: int = 43200,
    time_in_force: str = "GTC",
) -> dict

Places a special order (IFD / OCO / IFDOCO).

docs.title: cancel_parent_order / cancel_all_child_orders
docs.text:
client.cancel_parent_order(product_code, parent_order_id, parent_order_acceptance_id) -> None
client.cancel_all_child_orders(product_code: str) -> None

Cancels a parent order or all open orders for a product.

docs.title: get_child_orders / get_parent_orders / get_parent_order
docs.text:
client.get_child_orders(product_code, count, before, after, child_order_state, ...) -> list[dict]
client.get_parent_orders(product_code, count, before, after, parent_order_state) -> list[dict]
client.get_parent_order(parent_order_id, parent_order_acceptance_id) -> dict

Returns order lists and details.

docs.title: get_my_executions
docs.text:
client.get_my_executions(
    product_code, count, before, after,
    child_order_id, child_order_acceptance_id,
) -> list[dict]

Returns your personal execution history.

docs.title: get_balance_history
docs.text:
client.get_balance_history(currency_code: str = "JPY", count, before, after) -> list[dict]

Returns balance change history for the specified currency.

docs.title: get_positions
docs.text:
client.get_positions(product_code: str = "FX_BTC_JPY") -> list[dict]

Returns open CFD positions.

docs.title: get_collateral_history
docs.text:
client.get_collateral_history(count, before, after) -> list[dict]

Returns collateral change history.

docs.title: get_trading_commission
docs.text:
client.get_trading_commission(product_code: str) -> dict

Returns the trading commission rate for the specified product.

docs.title: Public API
docs.text: Endpoints that do not require authentication.

docs.title: get_markets
docs.text:
client.get_markets() -> list[dict]

Returns a list of available markets.

Example response: 

[
  {"product_code": "BTC_JPY", "market_type": "Spot"},
  {"product_code": "FX_BTC_JPY", "market_type": "FX"}
]

docs.title: get_board
docs.text:
client.get_board(product_code: str = "BTC_JPY") -> dict

Returns the order book for the specified market.

docs.title: get_ticker
docs.text:
client.get_ticker(product_code: str = "BTC_JPY") -> dict

Returns the latest ticker for the specified market.

Field Description ltp Last traded price best_bid / best_ask Best bid / ask price volume 24-hour trading volume

docs.title: get_executions
docs.text:
client.get_executions(
    product_code: str = "BTC_JPY",
    count: int | None = None,
    before: int | None = None,
    after: int | None = None,
) -> list[dict]

Returns execution history (up to 31 days in the past).

docs.title: get_board_state
docs.text:
client.get_board_state(product_code: str = "BTC_JPY") -> dict

Returns the current state of the order book, including health and state.

docs.title: get_health
docs.text:
client.get_health(product_code: str = "BTC_JPY") -> dict

Returns the current operational status of the exchange.

docs.title: get_funding_rate
docs.text:
client.get_funding_rate(product_code: str) -> dict

Returns the next scheduled funding rate. product_code is required (e.g. FX_BTC_JPY).

docs.title: get_funding_rate_history
docs.text:
client.get_funding_rate_history(
    product_code: str,
    count: int | None = None,
    from_: str | None = None,
    to: str | None = None,
) -> list[dict]

Returns historical funding rates.

docs.title: get_corporate_leverage
docs.text:
client.get_corporate_leverage() -> dict

Returns the maximum leverage for corporate accounts.

docs.title: get_chats
docs.text:
client.get_chats(from_date: str | None = None) -> list[dict]

Returns chat messages. Defaults to messages from the past 5 days if from_date is omitted.

docs.title: pylightningfx
docs.text: bitFlyer Lightning API の Python クライアントです。

docs.title: インストール
docs.text: pip install pylightningfx

docs.title: クイックスタート
docs.text:
from pylightningfx import Client

# Public API（認証不要）
client = Client()
ticker = client.get_ticker("BTC_JPY")
print(ticker["ltp"])  # 最終取引価格

# Private API
client = Client(api_key="YOUR_API_KEY", api_secret="YOUR_API_SECRET")
balance = client.get_balance()
print(balance)

docs.title: 特徴
docs.text:
• HTTP Public API を完全網羅
  • HTTP Private API を完全網羅
  • 外部依存ゼロ（標準ライブラリのみ）
  • HMAC-SHA256 認証を内蔵

docs.title: Private API
docs.text:
API キーと API シークレットによる認証が必要です。

from pylightningfx import Client

client = Client(api_key="YOUR_API_KEY", api_secret="YOUR_API_SECRET")

docs.title: get_permissions
docs.text:
client.get_permissions() -> list[str]

現在の API キーで呼出可能なエンドポイントの一覧を取得します。

docs.title: get_balance
docs.text:
client.get_balance() -> list[dict]

通貨ごとの資産残高を取得します。

docs.title: get_collateral / get_collateral_accounts
docs.text:
client.get_collateral() -> dict
client.get_collateral_accounts() -> list[dict]

証拠金の状態・通貨別の証拠金数量を取得します。

docs.title: get_addresses
docs.text:
client.get_addresses() -> list[dict]

仮想通貨の預入用アドレスを取得します。

docs.title: get_coin_ins / get_coin_outs
docs.text:
client.get_coin_ins(count, before, after) -> list[dict]
client.get_coin_outs(count, before, after) -> list[dict]

仮想通貨の預入・送付履歴を取得します。

docs.title: get_bank_accounts
docs.text:
client.get_bank_accounts() -> list[dict]

登録済み銀行口座の一覧を取得します。

docs.title: get_deposits / get_withdrawals
docs.text:
client.get_deposits(count, before, after) -> list[dict]
client.get_withdrawals(count, before, after, message_id) -> list[dict]

入金・出金履歴を取得します。

docs.title: withdraw
docs.text:
client.withdraw(
    currency_code: str,
    bank_account_id: int,
    amount: int,
    code: str | None = None,
) -> dict

出金を行います。二段階認証が必要な場合は code を指定してください。

docs.title: send_child_order
docs.text:
client.send_child_order(
    product_code: str,
    child_order_type: str,   # "LIMIT" または "MARKET"
    side: str,               # "BUY" または "SELL"
    size: float,
    price: float | None = None,
    minute_to_expire: int = 43200,
    time_in_force: str = "GTC",
) -> dict

新規注文を発注します。

docs.title: cancel_child_order
docs.text:
client.cancel_child_order(
    product_code: str,
    child_order_id: str | None = None,
    child_order_acceptance_id: str | None = None,
) -> None

注文をキャンセルします。child_order_id または child_order_acceptance_id のどちらかを指定してください。

docs.title: send_parent_order
docs.text:
client.send_parent_order(
    parameters: list[dict],
    order_method: str = "SIMPLE",  # SIMPLE / IFD / OCO / IFDOCO
    minute_to_expire: int = 43200,
    time_in_force: str = "GTC",
) -> dict

特殊注文（IFD / OCO / IFDOCO）を発注します。

docs.title: cancel_parent_order / cancel_all_child_orders
docs.text:
client.cancel_parent_order(product_code, parent_order_id, parent_order_acceptance_id) -> None
client.cancel_all_child_orders(product_code: str) -> None

親注文・対象プロダクトのすべての注文をキャンセルします。

docs.title: get_child_orders / get_parent_orders / get_parent_order
docs.text:
client.get_child_orders(product_code, count, before, after, child_order_state, ...) -> list[dict]
client.get_parent_orders(product_code, count, before, after, parent_order_state) -> list[dict]
client.get_parent_order(parent_order_id, parent_order_acceptance_id) -> dict

注文の一覧・詳細を取得します。

docs.title: get_my_executions
docs.text:
client.get_my_executions(
    product_code, count, before, after,
    child_order_id, child_order_acceptance_id,
) -> list[dict]

自分の約定履歴を取得します。

docs.title: get_balance_history
docs.text:
client.get_balance_history(currency_code: str = "JPY", count, before, after) -> list[dict]

指定通貨の残高変動履歴を取得します。

docs.title: get_positions
docs.text:
client.get_positions(product_code: str = "FX_BTC_JPY") -> list[dict]

建玉の一覧を取得します。

docs.title: get_collateral_history
docs.text:
client.get_collateral_history(count, before, after) -> list[dict]

証拠金の変動履歴を取得します。

docs.title: get_trading_commission
docs.text:
client.get_trading_commission(product_code: str) -> dict

指定プロダクトの取引手数料を取得します。

docs.title: Public API
docs.text: 認証不要で利用できるエンドポイントです。

docs.title: get_markets
docs.text:
client.get_markets() -> list[dict]

マーケットの一覧を取得します。

レスポンス例: 

[
  {"product_code": "BTC_JPY", "market_type": "Spot"},
  {"product_code": "FX_BTC_JPY", "market_type": "FX"}
]

docs.title: get_board
docs.text:
client.get_board(product_code: str = "BTC_JPY") -> dict

指定したマーケットの板情報を取得します。

docs.title: get_ticker
docs.text:
client.get_ticker(product_code: str = "BTC_JPY") -> dict

指定したマーケットの最新 Ticker を取得します。

フィールド 説明 ltp 最終取引価格 best_bid / best_ask ベストビッド / アスク価格 volume 24 時間の取引量

docs.title: get_executions
docs.text:
client.get_executions(
    product_code: str = "BTC_JPY",
    count: int | None = None,
    before: int | None = None,
    after: int | None = None,
) -> list[dict]

約定履歴を取得します（過去 31 日分）。

docs.title: get_board_state
docs.text:
client.get_board_state(product_code: str = "BTC_JPY") -> dict

板の状態（health と state）を取得します。

docs.title: get_health
docs.text:
client.get_health(product_code: str = "BTC_JPY") -> dict

取引所の稼動状態を取得します。

docs.title: get_funding_rate
docs.text:
client.get_funding_rate(product_code: str) -> dict

次回徴収・付与予定のファンディングレート授受率を取得します。product_code は必須（例: FX_BTC_JPY）。

docs.title: get_funding_rate_history
docs.text:
client.get_funding_rate_history(
    product_code: str,
    count: int | None = None,
    from_: str | None = None,
    to: str | None = None,
) -> list[dict]

過去のファンディングレート履歴を取得します。

docs.title: get_corporate_leverage
docs.text:
client.get_corporate_leverage() -> dict

法人アカウントの最大レバレッジを取得します。

docs.title: get_chats
docs.text:
client.get_chats(from_date: str | None = None) -> list[dict]

チャットの発言一覧を取得します。from_date を省略すると 5 日前からの発言を返します。
